caveat: Grammar patterns are genre-sensitive; Ngram is only a rough visibility signal. Validate with COHA/COCA before final claims.

series.caveat: Google Books Ngram measures printed-book visibility, not semantic meaning. Case-insensitive aggregates may include OCR and capitalization noise.
